message:
feat: Add geometry primitives and drawing module

- Add ftui-core/geometry: Rect and Sides primitives for layout
- Add ftui-render/drawing: Basic shape drawing utilities
- Update ftui-layout Cargo.toml to depend on ftui-core
- Clean up wrap.rs by removing redundant code
- Update width_cache.rs and text lib exports

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -5,3 +5,4 @@ edition = "2024"
 publish = false
 
 [dependencies]
+ftui-core = { path = "../ftui-core" }
\ No newline at end of file
